hero.subtitle: Create, customize, and launch your e-commerce business without code. Everything you need to sell online — in one beautifully simple platform.

features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed to grow your business — from your first sale to your millionth.

builder.title: Drag & Drop Builder
builder.desc: Design beautiful storefronts visually — no code, no complexity.

themes.title: Custom Themes
themes.desc: Pixel-perfect themes you can tailor to match your brand identity.

products.title: Product Management
products.desc: Inventory, variants, and collections — all in one clean dashboard.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.desc: PCI-compliant checkout with global payment methods built-in.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.desc: Real-time insights on sales, traffic, and customer behavior.

how.titleA: From idea to live store in

create.title: Create Account
create.desc: Sign up free in 30 seconds. No credit card required.

build.title: Build Your Store
build.desc: Pick a theme, add your products, and customize everything.

launch.title: Launch & Sell
launch.desc: Go live with one click and start accepting orders worldwide.

pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you grow. No hidden fees, ever.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For growing businesses ready to scale.

cta.title: Ready to build your store?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of founders building successful brands on Storely. Free forever to start.

footer.tagline: The fastest way to build, launch, and grow your e-commerce business.
footer.made: Made with care for founders worldwide.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your store.

signup.title: Create your store
signup.subtitle: Start selling online in minutes — no credit card required.
signup.name: Name
signup.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link to activate your store.
signup.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

home.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your store today.

addProduct.title: Add Product

customize.title: Customize Store
customize.desc: Pick a theme and brand your store.

home.noOrdersDesc: Orders will appear here once your customers start shopping.
home.checklistDesc: Complete a few steps to get your store ready for customers.
home.subActiveDesc: Your plan is active. All features are unlocked.
home.subPendingDesc: We'll activate your subscription as soon as the admin approves it.
home.subExpiredDesc: Renew to continue using your store. Your data is safe.
home.trialExpiredDesc: Upgrade to a paid plan to keep using your store.
home.trialDesc: Upgrade anytime to unlock unlimited access.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile, store, and payment preferences.
settings.profileDesc: Update your personal details and avatar.
settings.paymentsDesc: Connect a provider to start accepting payments.
settings.dangerDesc: Sign out of your account on this device.

storefront.notFoundDesc: The storefront {{slug}} doesn't exist or hasn't been published yet.

home.noProductsDesc: Check back soon — new items are on the way.
home.noMatchesDesc: Try a different search or category.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.demo: This is a demo checkout. No payment will be charged.
checkout.errFields: Please fill in all required fields.

success.title: Thank you for your order!
success.subtitle: We've received your order and sent a confirmation to your email. The shop will be in touch shortly to arrange shipping.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.introFallback: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.noDetails: The store hasn't added contact details yet.
contact.name: Your name
contact.sentDesc: We'll reply as soon as we can.
contact.successToast: Message sent. We'll get back to you soon!

about.fallbackContent: Welcome to our store. We are passionate about offering quality products and a delightful shopping experience.

track.title: Track your order
track.subtitle: Enter the phone number you used at checkout to see your order status.

steps.pendingMsg: Your order has been received and is awaiting confirmation.
steps.deliveredMsg: Your order has been delivered. Thank you!

cod.title: Order now — Cash on delivery
